ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, offline, hybrid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the subject belongs to */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code for the subject (e.g., PC, PE, OE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Instructor teaching the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grading_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grading criteria */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the criteria belongs to */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the grading criteria (e.g., Internal Marks, External Marks) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the grading criteria */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grading criteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grading_criteria_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the grade belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade of the student for the subject */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date of the grade update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "roll_number" TEXT /* Roll number of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the faculty member is teaching */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the course material */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the course material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the course material (e.g., lecture notes, assignments, readings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "total_marks" INTEGER /* Total marks for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the submitted assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade history entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the grade history belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade history belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade of the student for the course */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the grade update */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of the grade (e.g., mid-term, end-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_history_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_history_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semester" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the semester exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_planning" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic plan entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the plan belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the plan belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester the plan belongs to */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade of the student for the course in the semester */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_planning_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semester ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_planning_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_planning_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electives" (
  "elective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elective */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the elective */,
  "elective_name" TEXT /* Name of the elective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the elective */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the elective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electives_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the attendance record belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the attendance record belongs to */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who provided the feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the feedback belongs to */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
